text: CPU rollout + feature_cache re-wire: cluster-day 1130s→789s = 30.2% faster, 1.43× speedup, 341s/cluster-day saved, bit-identical.

locator.quote: reorders float reductions ~1e-6 → flips rare near-tie

text: The GPU batched forward can't be bit-identical: batching reorders float reductions ~1e-6 → flips rare near-tie Categorical.sample() actions vs the CPU golden.
So the bit-identical lever is CPU rollout, which also sidesteps the batch=1 CUDA-kernel-launch overhead.
